Scene 03 · The Origin
03
The Origin

An arachnophobic kid who raised 200 spiders.

The nickname is literal. Jalin grew up in San Bernardino terrified of spiders, so he started keeping them, two hundred tarantulas at the peak. By the time the fear wore off, the name had stuck.

That kid is the same one who now finishes fights in the first round. Every piece in this drop comes back to that story.

Wear The Story
200Fears Conquered
